headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Wednesday.
summary: Stay updated with the movements of the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Wednesday. Discover which stocks are leading as top gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: Verisk Gains From Recurring Revenues & Buyouts Amid Rising Debt
summary: VRSK benefits from recurring subscription revenues, premium growth and acquisitions. Its rising personnel costs, security risks & higher debt remain concerns.

headline: Integrated Quantum Appoints Former Equifax VP of Engineering Gustin Prudner to Accelerate Commercialization of VEIL(TM) and Expand Its AI Infrastructure Portfolio
